atomicity.message: Staged payload implements hook-context-aware next_steps for evidence failures, keeps the hook-context bead open until post-commit closure, and repairs two landed OXP tracker close reasons with commit and attestation refs.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: corrected staged hook/reporting payload is formatted, shell-syntax clean, whitespace-clean, and passes focused plus full staged-slice tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh mail 2951 verified hash --staged returned sha256:f538d04254cb7974eed5c3a5472ad922bcde37f1ab9f1a009d9a4dfe3009eedc with exactly the seven packet paths.
git diff --cached --check exited 0; bash -n passed for all three hook scripts.
Focused internal/backpressure and cmd/burpvalve tests plus staged-only go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: change centralizes hook-aware next-step decoration and source-label wording instead of duplicating reporting logic.
evidence: ScarletMarsh mail 2951 found existing failure next-step slices route through hookAwareNextSteps rather than hand-copying hook text in each branch.
hookCommandSourceLabel centralizes source-label vocabulary for source, path, repo-local, and unknown command source.
Three hook files use the same environment-forwarding pattern for commit and lint.

conditions.message: BrightOwl: revised staged payload improves blocked-hook guidance without manufacturing success evidence or weakening verifier/lint truthfulness.
evidence: BrightOwl mail 2950 verified packet 2947 against staged hash sha256:f538d04254cb7974eed5c3a5472ad922bcde37f1ab9f1a009d9a4dfe3009eedc.
Diff inspection found hookAwareNextSteps only activates when BURPVALVE_HOOK_CONTEXT == pre-commit; direct burpvalve commit next_steps remain unchanged.
Hook-aware text explicitly says not to treat hook failure as evidence that lint or verifier checks passed and tells the agent to keep the staged payload intact while collecting verifier evidence.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: governed behavior has focused tests for hook env propagation, direct output, hook missing-evidence output, and attestation-written rerun guidance.
evidence: cmd/burpvalve/hook_env_test.go expects hook=pre-commit and source=source before fake commit and fake lint invocations.
internal/backpressure/artifacts_test.go covers direct missing responses, hook missing responses, and hook attestation-written rerun discipline.
Focused test commands and staged-only full suite passed.

conditions.message: BrightOwl: current staged payload satisfies inspected bead acceptance criteria and is bound to the new packet hash.
evidence: BrightOwl mail 2950 inspected bead acceptance: hook-aware failures, unchanged direct command failures, distinguishable supported cases, JSON/human consistency, and no workflow engine.

Diff inspection found hook source/context env propagation in all three hook scripts and hook-aware next_steps wrapping for blocked report, response error, invalid matrix, stale attestation, and attestation-written cases.
Clean staged-slice checks passed: git diff --cached --check, hook bash -n, focused internal/backpressure and cmd/burpvalve tests, and go test ./....

conditions.message: BrightOwl: superseding response surface is hash-bound to the new payload and guidance preserves evidence truthfulness.
evidence: BrightOwl mail 2950 read the response file binding for staged hash sha256:f538d04254cb7974eed5c3a5472ad922bcde37f1ab9f1a009d9a4dfe3009eedc and manifest sha256:00e2a9854cb8dcbdde3e942841f405f13b196fd8b3ebe884380dd9f8c0fc8df5.
Diff inspection found next_steps preserve evidence discipline by naming hook context and warning hook failure is not proof lint or verifier checks passed.
Clean snapshot tests include hook missing responses and hook attestation-written cases asserting those evidence-discipline strings.

conditions.message: BrightOwl: superseding staged slice remains within hook-context next_steps plus protocol-required tracker corrections.
evidence: BrightOwl mail 2950 observed exactly seven staged packet paths in git diff --cached --name-status.

Staged .beads/issues.jsonl contains three intended tracker-line corrections: hook-context remains open for post-commit closure, hook-forwarding and prompt-export close reasons are repaired with commit/attestation refs.
Diff inspection found reporting/diagnostic behavior only: hook env propagation and next_steps text/tests, with no workflow-engine or unrelated staged feature.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: corrected staged change alters reporting, hook env forwarding, and tracker metadata only; no destructive commands or hidden mutation paths.
evidence: Hook changes add environment variables before existing commit and lint calls; no deletes, resets, force pushes, deploys, migrations, or external sends.
artifacts.go adds string-only next-step decoration and source-label helpers; no new write path beyond existing blocked report/attestation behavior.
Staged .beads leaves hook-context open and repairs only two prior close reasons with landed commit/attestation references.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: next-step output preserves payload/evidence discipline and corrected tracker payload avoids premature closure while repairing historical close reasons.
evidence: hookAwareNextSteps warns to keep current staged payload intact and not treat hook failure as evidence that lint or verifier checks passed.
Attestation-written and response-file cases have distinct rerun guidance.
ScarletMarsh mail 2951 confirmed staged .beads keeps hook-context open while repaired close reasons include landed commit and attestation paths.

conditions.message: BrightOwl: staged changes preserve hook execution boundary and add diagnostic env/context only.
evidence: BrightOwl mail 2950 found BURPVALVE_HOOK_CONTEXT and BURPVALVE_HOOK_COMMAND_SOURCE are set as environment variables on existing array command invocations; no eval or shell string interpolation introduced.
Command source labels are constrained to source, path, repo-local, or unknown and only affect diagnostic next_steps text.
Clean staged-slice checks passed bash -n, git diff --cached --check, focused tests, and go test ./....

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: no governed visual surface exists in this corrected staged payload.
evidence: Staged files are .beads/issues.jsonl, shell hook scripts, Go backpressure logic/tests, and one CLI hook-env test; no browser UI, TUI layout, screenshot surface, canvas, responsive layout, or visual asset is staged.
User-facing behavior is terminal JSON/human next-step text from existing command result structures, not a rendered visual component.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh: change adds constant-size string decoration and environment forwarding only; no new loops, scans, background work, or network calls.
evidence: hookAwareNextSteps performs a small environment check, appends a few strings, and scans the small base next-step slice with containsStep.
Hook scripts add constant environment assignments to existing commit/lint invocations; no extra Burpvalve invocations beyond existing two calls.
No staged code introduces goroutines, polling, network I/O, repository-wide scans, or persistent caches.

conditions.message: BrightOwl: guidance preserves agent autonomy boundary by directing explicit evidence/staging actions without automating approval.
evidence: BrightOwl mail 2950 found hook-aware next_steps tell agents to keep staged payload intact, collect verifier evidence, update response/attestation, stage attestation when written, and rerun git commit for revalidation.
Implementation does not auto-stage, auto-commit, bypass the hook, or declare evidence on the user’s behalf; it only changes diagnostic next_steps.
Tests assert direct non-hook next_steps and hook-context rerun discipline for missing responses and attestation-written cases.
